faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Define the metric baseline
howTo.summary: Establish a baseline for honest feedback acts per day. Aim for at least one act to start tracking your progress and identify areas for improvement.

howTo.title: Practice the 3-part feedback template
howTo.summary: Use the three-part template: start with a positive observation, suggest a specific change, and provide a brief rationale. This structure helps frame your feedback constructively.

howTo.title: Engage in daily feedback acts
howTo.summary: Commit to giving at least one piece of honest feedback each day. Focus on being specific and respectful to enhance clarity and relationships.

howTo.title: Reflect on feedback outcomes
howTo.summary: At the end of each week, review the feedback you provided. Assess how it was received and whether it led to any changes or improvements.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your feedback acts and reflections in the Brali LifeOS app to track your progress and reinforce the habit. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/honest-feedback-phrasing-coach/.
